params.name: Periodic Table Scripts
params.description:
On Dec 1, 1869 AD, the Mendeleev version of the Periodic Table was published.
Mendeleev documented element data. He recorded each element's atomic weight and related data on cards, making a 63-card deck. He later discovered the importance of atomic weight in element classification, and the properties of elements changed periodically with the increase of relative atomic mass. He wrote his findings on "The relationship between the properties of elements and their atomic mass." Later, he put the …
